chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-732 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of M.A. 5167 /2016 3. For hearing of main case 08.08.2023 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- Mr. Mashooque Ali advocate is holding brief for Mr. Bhagwan Das Bheel advocate for petitioner. He on his behalf submits that the petitioner is not in contact with him and as such the petition be disposed of accordingly. Petition is dismissed in view of the above. JUDGE JUDGE
